comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Lebanon episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE LEBANON COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/4uWyxSl

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN LEBANON*
  ◦ Baalbek, Byblos, Beirut, and Qadisha Valley day trips and guided experiences → https://shorturl.at/MEt5p
  ◦ Browse all Lebanon experiences → https://shorturl.at/Vk4fC

*📖 PLAN YOUR LEBANON TRIP*
  ◦ Bradt's Lebanon by Paul Doyle, the only English-language guide dedicated to the country → https://amzn.to/4dAKerw
  ◦ Lonely Planet Middle East Phrasebook, covers Levantine Arabic → https://amzn.to/3RD0Sy7

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO LEBANON*
  ◦ Pity the Nation by Robert Fisk, the definitive civil war eyewitness history → https://amzn.to/434J6X3
  ◦ Origins: A Memoir by Amin Maalouf, the Goncourt winner's Lebanese family chronicle → https://amzn.to/433uaZ9

*🍲 BRING LEBANON HOME*
  ◦ The Lebanese Cookbook by Salma Hage from the Qadisha Valley, the Phaidon classic → https://amzn.to/4dO6wou
  ◦ The Prophet by Kahlil Gibran, born in Bsharri above the cedars in this episode → https://amzn.to/43CBV8A

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: Thank you — Lebanon is one of those places where every layer you uncover opens another. More journeys on the way.
